title: 机械动力/航空学 附属模组汉化资源包
description: 添加了用于机械动力和航空学相关附属模组的汉化，适用于1.20.1和1.21.1。
body:
# 简介
本项目为[机械动力](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)/[航空学](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics)的相关附属模组进行汉化。
- [航空学-mc百科链接](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/26350.html)
- [机械动力-mc百科链接](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2021.html)
# 汉化模组

## 机械动力附属模组
- [[百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/19898.html)|[CF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-clothes)|[MR](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-clothes)]机械动力：服饰(Create: Clothes)
- [[百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/24988.html)|[MR](https://modrinth.com/mod/cbc-compact-mount)]机械动力火炮：紧凑式炮座(CBC: Compact Mount)

## 航空学附属模组
- [[百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17718.html)|[CF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-the-air-war)|[MR](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-the-air-war)]机械动力：空战(Create: The Air War)
- [[CF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hots-aerostuff)|[MR](https://modrinth.com/mod/hots-aerostuff)]Hot's Aerostuff
- [[CF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aeronautics-camera-sync)|[MR](https://modrinth.com/mod/aero_cam_sync)]Aeronautics Camera Sync
